misc: Bags Miura irons and is rumoured to sleep with them.
biography: Miso, a formidable presence hailing from Hirsala Golf, brings a unique blend of passion and precision to the greens. Known for his intense focus and unwavering dedication, Miso has carved out a notable career in the world of golf.

With ten appearances at the Hector Trophée, Miso is a seasoned competitor. His crowning achievement to date is his victory at the Hector Trophée, a testament to his skill and strategic acumen. While the Victor Trophy has eluded him thus far, Miso's ambition remains undiminished.

Off the course, Miso is known for his singular devotion to his equipment. He exclusively bags Miura irons, rumored to be the subject of his nightly affections, which speaks volumes about his commitment to the game.

Though not currently slated to participate in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, Miso remains an active figure in Hector events, and a last-minute entry is always a possibility. His fans eagerly await his next appearance, where he is sure to bring his characteristic intensity and skill to the competition.
